generatedSentence: A newly-promoted historian, a woman in bespoke khaki, enjoyed a smooth coffee in an uptown coffeehouse, the brand's abstract art interesting. She savored a tingly waffle, joyful in the environment, listening to vinyl. She often lurked here, a copy of an old dollhouse blueprint in hand, contemplating the original cathedral's landmarks amidst the bravo of street promotions. Suddenly, a vigorous racket erupted near the rusty shipyard. A saboteur, a fanatic noobs had called the 'ugliest cheater', was orchestrating ludicrous carjacks. He used a soundboard to create a noisy obbligato, a dangerous nuisance across the parkway. The historian realized this nasty character was performing a remake of an old crime, using virtual videos and injecting a needless level of scares, draining the city's peaceful approximation of an armistice. His bizarre projects even involved rodenticide near churches. The historian, now a vigorous fanatic, underwent a test, her viewpoint focused. She knew the saboteur’s jurisdiction was bolstered by a critical resistor that created a kilometer-long roadblock. She recalled an old giveaway, a set of keys with a homing device, a safeguard. As a taxi passed, a prickly intuition confirmed her suspicions about his overseas connections and seduction of local officials. She envisioned him masticating a sandwich, unaware of her intravenous counter-plan using nanoparticle tracking. In the fortress, the historian confronted the villain, who was surrounded by inflatable nymphs, an abstract, jokey scene. His illness, a result of greenockite exposure, had made him cry like a kakapo in a cradle. She used a duster to uncheck his solar-powered organ's main circuit. The city, now vaccinated against his lechery, could finally unblock its future. The smooth resolution ensured no more 'kissers' would be lured by his ugliest schemes, ensuring a genuinely joyful outcome.

imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting, thick white gutters, clean black borders. A female historian, wearing a bespoke khaki duster and carrying an antique leather-bound journal. TOP-LEFT PANEL: A woman sips coffee thoughtfully in an ornate, futuristic coffeehouse, a holographic dollhouse blueprint floats before her, wide shot. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: A chaotic street scene with a rusty, sleek, futuristic taxi being 'carjacked' by a shadowy figure near a vibrant, neon-lit shipyard, dynamic action shot. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: The woman, now determined, studies a complex holographic map displaying a kilometer-long roadblock and glowing nanoparticle trails, close-up on her intense face. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: The woman stands victorious in a high-tech fortress, a defeated, crying villain slumps beside a deactivated solar organ, full shot.

definitions.definition: To remain concealed in order to ambush.
To remain unobserved.
To hang out or wait around a location, preferably without drawing attention to oneself.
To view an internet forum without posting comments.
To saddle (a person) with an undesirable task or duty.
An alkaloid, C8H10N4O2, found naturally in tea and coffee plants which acts as a mild stimulant on the central nervous system.
An establishment where coffee is served to clients; a café.
Relating to the throne or the see of a bishop.
Something that is smooth, or that goes smoothly and easily.
A smoothing action.
A domestic animal having a smooth coat.
A member of an anti-hippie fashion movement in 1970s Britain.
The analysis obtained through a smoothing procedure.
To make smooth or even.
To make straightforward or easy.
To calm or palliate.

definitions.definition: (image processing, digital audio) To capture important patterns in the data, while leaving out noise.
To stroke; especially to stroke an animal's fur.
definitions.example: Can I smooth your cat?

definitions.definition: Having a texture that lacks friction. Not rough.
Without difficulty, problems, or unexpected consequences or incidents.
definitions.example: We hope for a smooth transition to the new system.

definitions.definition: Bland; glib.
Flowing or uttered without check, obstruction, or hesitation; not harsh; fluent.
(of a person) Suave; sophisticated.
(of an action) Natural; unconstrained.
(of a motion) Unbroken.
(chiefly of water) Placid, calm.
(of an edge) Lacking projections or indentations; not serrated.
(of food or drink) Not grainy; having an even texture.
(of a beverage) Having a pleasantly rounded flavor; neither rough nor astringent.
(of a function) Having derivatives of all finite orders at all points within the function’s domain.
(of a number) That factors completely into small prime numbers.
(of a vowel) Lacking marked aspiration.
(of muscles) Involuntary and non-striated.
Smoothly.
An abridgement or summary of a longer publication.
Something that concentrates in itself the qualities of a larger item, or multiple items.
An abstraction; an abstract term; that which is abstract.
The theoretical way of looking at things; something that exists only in idealized form.
An abstract work of art.
A summary title of the key points detailing a tract of land, for ownership; abstract of title.
To separate; to disengage.
To remove; to take away; withdraw.
To steal; to take away; to remove without permission.
To summarize; to abridge; to epitomize.

To conceptualize an ideal subgroup by means of the generalization of an attribute, as follows: by apprehending an attribute inherent to one individual, then separating that attribute and contemplating it by itself, then conceiving of that attribute as a general quality, then despecifying that conceived quality with respect to several or many individuals, and by then ideating a group composed of those individuals perceived to possess said quality.
To extract by means of distillation.
To consider abstractly; to contemplate separately or by itself; to consider theoretically; to look at as a general quality.
To withdraw oneself; to retire.
To draw off (interest or attention).
definitions.example: He was wholly abstracted by other objects.

definitions.definition: To perform the process of abstraction.
To create abstractions.
To produce an abstraction, usually by refactoring existing code. Generally used with "out".
definitions.example: He abstracted out the square root function.

definitions.definition: Derived; extracted.
Drawn away; removed from; apart from; separate.
Not concrete: conceptual, ideal.
Difficult to understand; abstruse; hard to conceptualize.
Separately expressing a property or attribute of an object that is considered to be inherent to that object: attributive, ascriptive.

Pertaining comprehensively to, or representing, a class or group of objects, as opposed to any specific object; considered apart from any application to a particular object: general, generic, nonspecific; representational.
Absent-minded.
Pertaining to the formal aspect of art, such as the lines, colors, shapes, and the relationships among them.
Insufficiently factual.
Apart from practice or reality; vague; theoretical; impersonal; not applied.
(grammar) As a noun, denoting an intangible as opposed to an object, place, or person.
Of a class in object-oriented programming, being a partial basis for subclasses rather than a complete template for objects.
The armistice agreement signed between the Allies and Germany on 11 November 1918 to end World War I; (by extension) the end of World War I.
A (short) cessation of combat; a ceasefire, a truce.
A formal agreement, especially between nations, to end combat.
A dull, yellowish-brown colour, the colour of dust.
Khaki green, a dull green colour.
A strong cloth of wool or cotton, often used for military or other uniforms.
A soldier wearing a khaki uniform.
A British person (from the colour of the uniform of British troops, originally in the Second Boer War; compare rooinek). (In this sense the plural generally is khakies.)
Khaki clothing or uniform, commonly in the plural.

definitions.definition: Dust-coloured; of the colour of dust.
To engage the attention of; to awaken interest in; to excite emotion or passion in, in behalf of a person or thing.

definitions.definition: To lose liquid.

To put ribs across the back of (a picture), to prevent the panels from warping.
To shed tears; to weep.

VHS.

definitions.definition: (of a class member) Capable of being overridden with a different implementation in a subclass.
Pertaining to particles in temporary existence due to the Heisenberg uncertainty principle.
Physically strong and active.
Mentally strong and active.
Rapid of growth.

definitions.definition: Champagne.

definitions.definition: Full of bubbles.

definitions.definition: Cheerful, lively.

definitions.definition: Having the characteristics of bubbles.

To speak about; tell of; relate; discuss.
To speak for beforehand; engage in advance; make arrangements for; order or reserve in advance.
To stipulate, solicit, ask for, or request, as in a favour.

definitions.definition: To forbode; foretell.
To speak to; address.
To betoken; show; indicate; foretell; suggest; allude to.

definitions.definition: To speak up or out; exclaim; speak.
Individually or custom made.
Relating to someone who makes custom-made products, especially clothing items.

definitions.definition: To consume (a liquid) through the mouth.
definitions.example: He drank the water I gave him.

definitions.definition: (metonymic) To consume the liquid contained within (a bottle, glass, etc.).
definitions.example: Jack drank the whole bottle by himself.

definitions.definition: To consume alcoholic beverages.
definitions.example: Everyone who is drinking is drinking, but not everyone who is drinking is drinking.

definitions.definition: To take in (a liquid), in any manner; to suck up; to absorb; to imbibe.
To take in; to receive within one, through the senses; to inhale; to hear; to see.
To smoke, as tobacco.
An act or session by which drink is consumed, especially alcoholic beverages.
A minor fright.

definitions.definition: A cause of slight terror; something that inspires fear or dread.

definitions.definition: A device or object used to frighten.
A dish or foodstuff where two or more slices of bread serve as the wrapper or container of some other food.

A layer cake or sandwich cake.
To place one item between two other, usually flat, items
To put or set something between two others, in time.
Of a meal or serving size that is smaller than a dinner.
A board placed within a musical instrument to improve vibrations.

A sounding board.
A control panel offering playback of various sound effects.
A place where ships are built and repaired.
Animal excrement, especially that of common domestic farm animals and when used as fertilizer. Generally speaking, from cows, horses, sheep, pigs and chickens.
Any fertilizing substance, whether of animal origin or not; fertiliser.
Rubbish; nonsense; bullshit.
To cultivate by manual labor; to till; hence, to develop by culture.
To apply manure (as fertilizer or soil improver).

definitions.definition: To chew (food).
definitions.example: The cow stood, quietly masticating its cud.

definitions.definition: To grind or knead something into a pulp.
A planned endeavor, usually with a specific goal and accomplished in several steps or stages.

definitions.definition: An idle scheme; an impracticable design.

A projectile.
A projection.
The place from which a thing projects.
To extend beyond a surface.
To cast (an image or shadow) upon a surface; to throw or cast forward; to shoot forth.
To extend (a protrusion or appendage) outward.
To make plans for; to forecast.
definitions.example: The CEO is projecting the completion of the acquisition by April 2007.

definitions.definition: To present (oneself), to convey a certain impression, usually in a good way.
To assume qualities or mindsets in others based on one's own personality.
To change the projection (or coordinate system) of spatial data with another projection.
To draw straight lines from a fixed point through every point of any body or figure, and let these fall upon a surface so as to form the points of a new figure.

A minor annoyance or inconvenience.
A person or thing causing annoyance or inconvenience.
Anything harmful or offensive to the community or to a member of it, for which a legal remedy exists.

definitions.definition: To remove a checkmark.

definitions.definition: (travel) To remove a previously checked-in passenger from the check-in system, allowing changes to the ticket.
The residential part of a city, away from the commercial center
In the upper part of a town.

To or in the upper part of a town.

definitions.definition: In a vivid manner.
A person who is zealously enthusiastic for some cause, especially in religion.
Fanatical.
Showing evidence of possession by a god or demon; frenzied, overzealous.
A fortified place; a large and permanent fortification, sometimes including a town; for example a fort, a castle; a stronghold; a place of defense or security.
A position that, if obtained by the weaker side, will prevent penetration by the opposing side, generally achieving a draw.
To furnish with a fortress or with fortresses; to guard, to fortify.
An object or other creation (e.g. narrative work) from which all later copies and variations are derived

definitions.definition: A person with a unique and interesting personality and/or creative talent

definitions.definition: An eccentric
Relating to the origin or beginning; preceding all others

definitions.definition: Fresh, different

definitions.definition: Pioneering

definitions.definition: Having as its origin

definitions.definition: A larger part of an organism, composed of tissues that perform similar functions.

Short for organ pipe cactus.
The penis.

Measured by the progress or revolution of the sun in the ecliptic; as, the solar year.
Produced by the action of the sun, or peculiarly affected by its influence.

One who resists, especially a person who fights against an occupying army.

A road; a thoroughfare.
A scenic freeway.
A divided highway with a landscaped median.
(Chicago) A tree lawn.
Making a noise, especially a loud unpleasant sound

definitions.definition: Unpleasant-looking and causing unwanted attention

definitions.definition: Very recently; in the immediate past.

To move an aircraft on the ground under its own power.

Treat with a vaccine to produce immunity against a disease.

A light, loose-fitting long coat.

The tewit (Vanellus cristatus) (which is a type of lapwing in the first sense).
A silly man.

Organized religion in general or a specific religion considered as a political institution.

To educate someone religiously, as in in a church.
One who cheats.

Abroad.

definitions.definition: Across a sea; to or in an area across a sea.

definitions.definition: Across a sea; to an area across a sea.

The act of seducing.

Face.
The kissing gourami.

An obstacle or impediment.
To prevent, hinder.

definitions.definition: Displeasing to the eye; not aesthetically pleasing.

Offensive to one's sensibilities or morality.

definitions.definition: Ill-natured; crossgrained; quarrelsome.

definitions.definition: Unpleasant; disagreeable; likely to cause trouble or loss.
